name: Oatmeal Banana Bars
recipeInstructions:
Recipe by: Jo Anne Merrill
Preparation Time: 1:30
1. Choose ripe bananas with some dark brown flecks on the peel. Mash them to make about 1 cup.
2. Cream together the margarine and brown sugar until light and fluffy.
3. Add the beaten egg, salt, mashed bananas, vanilla extract, and peanut butter. Beat until well mixed.
4. Stir in the oats and blend thoroughly.
5. Grease a 13 x 9 x 2-inch pan with cooking spray or oil.
6. Spread the mixture evenly in the prepared pan.
7. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 50-60 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
8. Allow to cool slightly before cutting into bars that are about 1 x 2 inches each.
Yield: About 4 dozen bars.
